instruction: 帮我把客户反馈整理一下

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = '客户'
ws['B1'] = '评分(1-5)'
ws['C1'] = '是否复购'
ws['D1'] = '反馈类别'
ws['A2'] = '客户A'
ws['B2'] = 5
ws['C2'] = '是'
ws['D2'] = '产品'
ws['A3'] = '客户B'
ws['B3'] = 3
ws['C3'] = '否'
ws['D3'] = '服务'
ws['A4'] = '客户C'
ws['B4'] = 4
ws['C4'] = '是'
ws['D4'] = '产品'
ws['A5'] = '客户D'
ws['B5'] = 5
ws['C5'] = '是'
ws['D5'] = '价格'
ws['A6'] = '客户E'
ws['B6'] = 2
ws['C6'] = '否'
ws['D6'] = '服务'
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/customer_feedback.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: 帮我把客户反馈整理一下
从/home/user/Desktop/customer_feedback.xlsx中统计评分>=4的客户数量，在/home/user/Desktop/feedback_digest.txt末尾追加：'高满意度客户：3人'，保存
